name: family-hub-app
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for families. Monorepo root.

scripts.dev:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait
scripts._assert-bddgen: find tests/e2e/.features-gen -name '*.spec.js' | grep -q . || (echo '✗ bddgen produced 0 specs — feature/step paths broken?' && exit 1)
scripts._assert-bddgen-critical: find tests/e2e/.features-gen-critical -name '*.spec.js' | grep -q . || (echo '✗ bddgen produced 0 specs — feature/step paths broken or @critical tag missing?' && exit 1)
scripts.test:e2e: bddgen test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts && pnpm run _assert-bddgen && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:critical: bddgen test --config tests/e2e/playwright.critical.config.ts && pnpm run _assert-bddgen-critical && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.critical.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: bddgen test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts && pnpm run _assert-bddgen && playwright test --ui --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
